name: Shotshape Golf Studio - Northeast
address: 1209 Tyler St NE UNIT 110, Minneapolis, MN 55413
about: Shotshape Golf Studio is Minneapolis' private golf simulator venue offering 24/7 access to members. The studio provides a fully private space for individuals to practice or play on over 350 of the world's top golf courses using Trackman technology. Membership is required for access, with options ranging from monthly to annual terms and a limit on the number of members to ensure availability.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to a fully private golf simulator space
Industry-leading Trackman launch monitor technology for data-based feedback
Entire studio reserved solely for you during your booking

food_and_drink.notes: No food provided; members are welcome to bring or order their own food.
No alcohol provided; members are welcome to bring their own beverages. A mini fridge is available to keep drinks cool.

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading launch monitor technology for swing data and course simulation

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own golf clubs for use during your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring or order your own food and drinks. A mini fridge is provided to keep beverages cool. All members are expected to clean up after themselves to leave the studio clean for the next user.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for completing 18 holes. The time required would depend on the player's pace and the number of players sharing the bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, Shotshape Golf Studio is a private golf simulator focused on adult golf practice and is not described as a family-friendly or kid-oriented venue.
